text:
Thank you to everyone who came out yesterday! 🐾 We loved seeing so many Shih Tzus and their humans and appreciate everyone who joined us.

To those who couldn’t make it because of vaccine requirements, we truly missed you and are sorry. We did include the requirements in the event information, but we know some pups were turned away or some owners realized too late that a vaccine had expired, and we understand how disappointing that can be.

The bright side? Situations like this are exactly why pet owners need @getpawchart - Having your pet’s records organized and easily accessible helps avoid those last-minute surprises and makes attending events, daycare, boarding, and vet visits so much easier.

Thank you again for making the @getpawchart launch event so special, and we can’t wait to see everyone—including those we missed—at the next one! ❤️🐶
